project_description: CDN modernization for video content delivery (IPTV). Replacing Varnish 4 with Varnish 7 + new VCL configuration, adding L2 cache layer (Redis), origin shield, purge API, hit ratio and latency monitoring, handling 10Gbps peak traffic.
client_history: CDN running for 5 years — Varnish 4 reaching EOL support.
risk_patterns: VCL between versions — breaking changes in syntax and behavior.
pm_comment: VCL migration from V4 to V7 had breaking changes — but well documented by Varnish.
